capture_meta.source: KONNWEI KW330 - Print Data Stream over USB CDC (/dev/cu.usbmodem*)
capture_meta.time_basis: t_sec = 'Time Since Engine Start' (sec). t_sec_estimated=true means interpolated by frame index (the frame itself lacked that PID).
IMPORTANT_caveats: PARTIAL trip: capture began MID-DRIVE (~t=160-238s engine time) and ends at SHUTDOWN. Excludes key-on/battery-only phase, cold start, and the first few minutes.

PAGED SCROLL, not synchronized snapshots: the device streams whatever PID page was on-screen, so different PIDs were sampled at different instants (~10s apart). A single sample row rarely contains all PIDs; nulls are expected.
Some values lost/garbled to text value-bleed in the serial stream; cadence is irregular.
For rigorous debugging, recapture from key-on (start kw330_capture.py BEFORE turning the key) across the whole trip.
